title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 15, 2023
summary: June 15 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a higher rate of 4.81% , from the level on 06/08/2023 of 11.551 M km 2 to 10.995 M km 2 for this week.
